svg.title: Foxpress Studios Landing Page — Dev Roadmap
svg.desc: Step-by-step guide to build the Foxpress Studios landing page with Vite, React, and TypeScript

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me exactly how to scaffold the Foxpress Studios project with Vite, React, and TypeScript')
sendPrompt('What npm packages do I install for the Foxpress Studios landing page? List exact install commands.')
sendPrompt('Show me the tailwind.config.ts and index.css setup for the Foxpress Studios gold and black theme')
g.text: Custom palette: #C9A227 gold, #0A0A0A black, #1A1A1A surface, #F5F5F0 cream

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Generate the full folder structure for Foxpress Studios with components, hooks, and assets')
g.text: src/components/ → Navbar, Hero, Stats, Services, Footer
src/constants/ → nav links, services data, stats data

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Navbar component for Foxpress Studios with the gold logo, nav links, and Contact Us button in React TypeScript')
g.text: Top bar (email + address) · Logo · Nav links with gold active state
Gold bordered "Contact Us →" CTA · Sticky + transparent-to-dark on scroll

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Hero section for Foxpress Studios with the dragon background, headline, subtext, and two CTA buttons in React TypeScript')
g.text: Full-bleed background image · Gradient overlay · Eyebrow + headline
"Our Services →" gold button · "View Our Work →" ghost button · Award badges

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Stats bar component showing 20+ Awards, 500+ Projects, 30+ Countries, 100+ Professionals in React TypeScript with gold icons')
g.text: Dark background strip · 4 metric cards with gold icons
Count-up animation on scroll using react-intersection-observer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Services section for Foxpress Studios with 4 cards: Film, CGI, Publicity, Events — dark cards with hover effect in React TypeScript')
g.text: "What We Do" eyebrow · Intro text + Explore Services link
4-column card grid: Film & Video · CGI & Animation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What other sections should I add after the hero and services on the Foxpress Studios landing page?')
sendPrompt('Write a Footer component for Foxpress Studios with logo, nav links, social icons, and copyright in React TypeScript')
g.text: Logo · Links · Facebook / Instagram / LinkedIn / YouTube icons · Copyright

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add Framer Motion scroll-triggered animations to the Foxpress Studios landing page sections?')
g.text: Framer Motion: fade-up on section entry · Hero text stagger
GSAP for parallax dragon BG · Card hover lift + glow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I make the Foxpress Studios landing page fully responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop with Tailwind?')
g.text: Mobile-first Tailwind breakpoints (sm: md: lg: xl:)
Hamburger menu on mobile · Single-column cards on sm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What performance optimizations should I do for the Foxpress Studios landing page with large hero images?')
g.text: Convert dragon images to WebP · Lazy-load below-fold sections
vite-plugin-imagemin · Code-split routes · Preload hero image

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I deploy the Foxpress Studios React site to Vercel or Netlify with a custom domain?')
g.text: npm run build → Vercel / Netlify drag-and-drop or GitHub CI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What SEO meta tags and Open Graph tags should I add to the Foxpress Studios landing page?')
g.text: react-helmet-async · OG image · Schema.org LocalBusiness markup

svg.text: Tap any step to get the code for it →
